eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Jackson, OR; at 7:50 PM on JUL 15, 2026 Effective until 7:50 AM JUL 16, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Jackson County Sheriff's Office- Level 3 GO NOW evacuation notice UPGRADED for JAC-126 near the area of Evans Creek Rd and W Fork Trail Creek Rd due to Evans Creek Road Fire. Continue to monitor official news sources for evacuation and incident information.
